So what we're going to do is we're actually going to sign your own accountability coach. Pretty cool, right? So you're going to owe them three things. One is a picture of your groceries. That way we know that you're buying food the way we told you to, right? Now you know we're serious. Second thing is you're going to check in on Facebook three times on a free chore cow. That way you know that you're accountable for your exercise. So you're accountable for fitness, accountable for nutrition. And then third thing is accountable for the results, right? And that's holding us accountable as much as it's us holding you accountable. So each week you're going to weigh in on the scale, you're going to write your weight next to your name.
